archetype.name: Horizon Walker
archetype.note: This archetype offers Warden's Step at a different level than displayed here.

feat.name: Warden's Step
feat.text: You can guide your allies to move quietly through the wilderness. When you Avoid Notice during exploration in natural terrain, you can designate any number of your allies to gain the benefits as if they were using that activity during that exploration. This requires no action on their part

traits.name: Ranger
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the ranger class.

sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.
